class.description: ARA* (Anytime Repairing A*) global planner. Runs weighted-A* searches with a shrinking inflation factor epsilon, reusing the OPEN and INCONS lists to return a bounded-suboptimal path quickly and improve it toward optimal within a per-plan expansion budget. Upstream Nav2 has no anytime planner. Classical (non-learned) and deterministic. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.
